## Changes in vX.X.X

- 

## Downloads

| Platform | File |
|----------|------|
| Windows | `DarkWave-windows.zip` |
| Linux | `DarkWave-linux` |
| Mac | `DarkWave-mac` |

> **Windows users:** If the app opens but shows a black screen, download `DarkWave-windows-mesa-fallback.zip` and extract its DLL files into the same folder as `DarkWave.exe`. This is only needed on very old machines or VMs without proper GPU drivers.
